types.name: Flood Damage
immediate_actions: Do not enter flooded fields until water recedes completely
Drain standing water using pumps or drainage channels
Document damage with geo-tagged photos and videos
Report loss to agriculture officer within 72 hours
Salvage any harvestable produce before rot sets in
Apply lime to waterlogged soil after water drains
types.compensation_process: District administration conducts crop loss survey (Girdawari). Loss percentage calculated against normal yield. PMFBY claim filed automatically for enrolled farmers. State disaster relief fund may provide additional compensation.
insurance_claim: Inform insurance company within 72 hours of flood
Call Kisan Call Centre: 1800-180-1551
Surveyor visits field within 7 days
Submit claim form with photos and land records
Compensation credited within 15-30 days

types.name: Drought Damage
immediate_actions: Prioritize irrigation for critical growth stages
Apply mulch to conserve soil moisture
Switch to drought-tolerant crop varieties if replanting
Reduce fertilizer dose to match water availability
Provide shade nets for vegetable crops if possible
Report crop stress to local agriculture office
documents: Photos showing wilted/cracked soil and crop
PMFBY or state drought relief enrollment proof
types.compensation_process: State government declares drought-affected blocks. Special relief packages announced including input subsidy, seed distribution, and cattle fodder. PMFBY covers yield loss if enrolled.
insurance_claim: Check if your block is notified under PMFBY drought coverage
Report yield loss at harvest through crop cutting experiment
Contact agriculture officer for survey scheduling
Submit claim with yield data and land records

types.name: Cyclone Damage
immediate_actions: Ensure personal safety before assessing field damage
Uproot and support partially fallen plants within 48 hours
Remove salt spray deposits by light irrigation
Collect and store undamaged harvested produce
Document all damage with timestamped photos
Contact nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra for recovery guidance
documents: Geo-tagged damage photos from multiple angles
types.compensation_process: State disaster management authority assesses damage. Central and state disaster relief funds activated. PMFBY covers notified crops. NDRF and state teams conduct joint surveys.
insurance_claim: Report within 72 hours to insurance company
Do not clear field before surveyor visit
State agriculture department coordinates mass survey
Claim processed based on percentage area damaged

types.name: Hailstorm Damage
immediate_actions: Inspect standing crops within 24 hours of hail
Remove severely damaged plant parts to prevent disease
Apply fungicide spray to prevent secondary infection
Assess if crop can recover or needs replanting
Take photos immediately while hail damage is visible
Inform agriculture officer same day if possible
documents: Local newspaper or IMD weather report
types.compensation_process: Patwari and agriculture officer conduct joint Girdawari within 15 days. Loss assessed as percentage of standing crop. PMFBY claim for enrolled farmers. Some states offer hail-specific relief.
insurance_claim: Report to insurance company within 72 hours
Preserve damaged crop until survey
Surveyor assesses defoliation and stem breakage
Compensation based on sum insured and loss percentage

types.name: Pest Attack Damage
immediate_actions: Identify pest species before spraying any chemical
Use recommended dose of pesticide — never overdose
Apply during evening hours to protect pollinators
Install pheromone traps for monitoring
Remove heavily infested plant parts
Contact KVK for integrated pest management advice
documents: Photos of pest and damaged crop
PMFBY enrollment (covers pest damage in some states)
types.compensation_process: Pest outbreaks declared by state agriculture department may trigger input subsidy. PMFBY covers pest damage where notified. Locust attacks covered under central scheme.
insurance_claim: Report pest damage if crop loss exceeds threshold
Agriculture officer verifies pest species and damage extent
Crop cutting experiment at harvest for yield loss proof
Submit claim with officer's assessment report
